# ACTIVA SL Digital

> Enterprise Software Engineering & AI Consultancy — Madrid, Spain (Founded 2024)

## About
ACTIVA SL Digital is a software engineering firm specializing in building proprietary digital infrastructure for businesses. We design, develop, and deploy custom CRMs, high-performance websites, and internal business applications. Our model delivers software as an owned asset, not a rented subscription.

## Core Differentiator: Evidence-Based AI
We implement AI integrations with granular proof enforcement — every AI recommendation is traceable and verifiable, preventing hallucinations in business-critical workflows.

## Services
- **Custom CRM/ERP Development**: React + Firebase + Google Cloud. Full data sovereignty. GDPR/ISO compliant.
- **High-Performance Web Development**: <0.5s load time, 98/100 Lighthouse score, advanced technical SEO.
- **ACTIVA OS (Titanium)**: Proprietary Command Center for CEOs — integrates Gemini (Active Agent) + NotebookLM (Passive Agent) in an A2A orchestration platform.
- **AI Integration Strategy**: Transition from manual processes to AI-driven workflows with zero hallucination guarantee.
- **Technical Audit**: Deep analysis of technical debt, architecture review, and optimization roadmap.

## Technology Stack
React 18, TypeScript, Vite 5, Tailwind CSS, Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Hosting, Functions), Google Cloud Platform, PWA (Offline-First)

## Pricing Model
- **Audit**: From €5,000 (Technical Debt Analysis + Roadmap)
- **Web High-Performance**: From €8,000 (4-6 weeks delivery)
- **Custom CRM/Platform**: From €15,000 (8-12 weeks delivery)
- **Model**: Proprietary Software (Asset). NOT a subscription. Client owns 100% of code and data.

## Target Industries
Construction firms, retail chains, healthcare organizations, professional services, SMEs seeking digital sovereignty.
